disposition_rationale: The current repo charter conflicts with the intended use of the context repository as efficient loaded working state rather than append-only architectural specification.
next_step: Route a redesign handoff to the context-repo session to propose a state-oriented structure and provenance contract.
summary: The current context-repository repo is optimized as an abstract specification layer, but the intended design is a current-state filing system that can be loaded as working context while logs live elsewhere. Redesign it around system/project status and active-issue surfaces, with git history and session_id-linked commits providing change narrative and provenance.
title: Redesign context-repository around current-state context surfaces
